meaning: adj.珍珠似的,用珍珠装饰的
examples: At night, these streets are brilliant with the pearly radiance of electricity.
Read on to find out what you can do to keep your pearly white teeth sparkling.
A flashing set of healthy and clean, regular 'pearly whites' was a rare sight in Victorian society, the preserve of the super-rich (and even then, dental hygiene was not guaranteed).
For some brides, something old, something borrowed, something blue and something pearly-white are all must-haves.
In full season during the winter months, their refined taste and pearly whiteness make them a favorite holiday treat.
